_comment: Sample Windsurf Cascade hooks config. Merge the post_cascade_response_with_transcript entry into your real ~/.codeium/windsurf/hooks.json. Replace ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO_REPO with this project's absolute path. IMPORTANT: confirm the exact hooks.json schema against the current docs (https://docs.windsurf.com/windsurf/cascade/hooks) — field names may differ between versions. Use an absolute path; hooks do not run from the repo directory.
